channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Google unleashes a native Gemini app for the Mac
item.description: Not content with stuffing Gemini into all of its own apps and services, Google wants you to adopt its AI assistant on desktops and laptops too. The company released a Gemini Windows app on Tuesday and it's following that up a day later with one for Macs.Google says the macOS Gemini app is a "native desktop experience" that you can access with a keyboard shortcut. By default, pressing option and space will open a mini chat, while a combo of option, shift and space will open the full Gemini chat experience. You'll be able to adjust these bindings in the app settings.Users will be able to share a...

item.title: Best Buy’s Ultimate Upgrade Sale features deals on dozens of our favorite gadgets
item.description: If you missed out on Amazon’s recent spring sales event, Best Buy’s Ultimate Upgrade Sale presents yet another opportunity to score steep discounts on some of our favorite gadgets. The five-day sale runs through April 19th and features deals on a wide range of tech, including 4K TVs, Apple gear, smartphones, smart home devices, and […]

item.title: Disney’s Massive Layoffs Have Seemingly Hit Marvel Hard
item.description: About 1,000 people are facing layoffs at Disney—with Marvel Studios reportedly facing big cuts that include almost wiping out its visual development team.

item.title: The Senate is voting to save free IRS Direct File today
item.description: The Senate is getting ready to vote on a bill to resurrect IRS Direct File, the free tax filing service axed by the Trump administration in 2025. On Wednesday, Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-MA) will seek unanimous consent to pass the Direct File Act, where it will either get fast-tracked to the House of Representatives or […]

item.title: Margo's Got Money Troubles review — Apple TV's new comedy series is addictive and surprisingly heartfelt
item.description: Margo's Got Money Troubles is Apple TV's newest comedy, and it might surprise you how good it is.

item.title: Recteq X-Fire Pro 825 review: A smart grill that pulls double duty
item.description: Occasionally, you really can have it both ways. For the most part, pellet grills are great for smoking and mid-temperature cooking, but you’ll typically need other grills for high-heat searing and 1,000-degree temperatures(with a few exceptions). Sure, some pellet grills allow you to move the heat deflector for direct access to the fire pot for searing, but that’s still not a cooking experience that will be familiar to gas grill users. With the X-Fire Pro 825 ($1,550), Recteq is putting its pellet grill expertise to work in a dual-mode design that’s meant to bridge the gap between gas and woo...

item.title: Anthropic Is Jacking Up the Price for Power Users Amid Complaints Its Model Is Getting Worse
item.description: Heavy users could pay significantly more under a new usage-based pricing model.

item.title: WordPress websites under attack — expert report says dozens of plugins hijacked to target thousands of sites
item.description: A malicious actor found a struggling WordPress plugin company, bought it, and introduced malware to each product.

item.title: Amazon lance une nouvelle clé Fire TV Stick HD : tout ce qu’il faut savoir
item.description: Après la refonte de l'interface Fire TV, Amazon enrichit la gamme des clés de streaming du même nom. Voyons ce que cache le nouveau modèle du Fire TV Stick HD.

item.title: Quelle imprimante 3D choisir pour débuter ? Notre sélection
item.description: L'impression 3D a longtemps été réservée aux passionnés et aux débrouillards. Le marché a ensuite pris le temps de mûrir pour offrir des produits accessibles au plus grand nombre. Voici notre sélection des meilleures imprimantes 3D pour ceux qui débutent.

item.title: Amazon’s Google Pixel sale significantly undercuts Apple and Samsung on price — now's the time to buy
item.description: Amazon's current discounts on the Pixel 10 series return the devices to the previous record-lows from Black Friday.

item.title: Most people still don’t want anything to do with robotaxis
item.description: I've been reporting on self-driving cars for over a decade, and I've seen the technology go through many ups and downs, highs and lows. But one thing has remained remarkably the same over the years: the public just ain't buying it. Poll after poll has revealed a deep and abiding skepticism toward autonomous vehicles. People […]

item.title: Quoi de mieux que de la 4K pour télétravailler ? Cet écran de 28″ avec 1ms de latence s’offre une réduction de 50% sur Amazon
item.description: L'Iiyama ProLite B2875UHSU-B1 est un écran PC de 28 pouces affichant de la 4K que vous retrouvez à 181,04 euros au lieu de 359 euros sur Amazon.

item.title: Snap is laying off 16 percent of its workforce, blames AI
item.description: Snap is laying off around 1,000 staff, amounting to 16 percent of its workforce, which it will seemingly replace with AI. The cuts were announced in a company-wide memo from CEO Evan Spiegel, who added that more than 300 open roles are also being closed. Spiegel said the "incredibly difficult" decision would likely save Snap more than $500 million by the second half of 2026, in turn helping it to "establish a clearer path to net-income profitability." Impacted staff were notified by email and the company’s North America-based team were instructed to work from home. Snap said it would provide f...

item.title: 5 nail-biting crime dramas on cable TV that you've definitely missed — but there's still a way to stream them
item.description: Don't dismiss these gripping crime dramas on cable TV just because we're in the streaming service era — especially when there's an easy way to combine the two.

item.title: Anthropic shrugs off VC funding offers valuing it at $800B+, for now
item.description: VCs are frothing at the mouth to write more checks to Anthropic at a valuation that matches or beats OpenAI's.

item.title: Why Amazon Is Buying Globalstar—and What It Means for Your iPhone
item.description: Amazon is paying more than $11 billion for a small satellite company.

item.title: Claude is having some problems, as Anthropic confirms an active issue — here's everything we know
item.description: Claude is having some problems, as Anthropic confirms an active issue

item.title: Arsenal vs Sporting CP Free Streams: TV Channels, Kick-Off time for Champions League quarter-final 2nd leg
item.description: Here's how to watch Arsenal vs Sporting CP in the second leg of their Champions League 2025-26 quarter-final at the Emirates Stadium

item.title: Shoe company pivots to AI compute in sign of a totally normal and healthy economy
item.description: The shoe company Allbirds, famous for its wool trainers, is pivoting to AI. You read that right. The San Francisco company has plans "to pivot its business to AI compute infrastructure, with a long-term vision to become a fully integrated GPU-as-a-Service and AI-native cloud solutions provider." It's also changing its name to NewBird AI. This is subject to shareholder approval, with a vote scheduled for May 18. Once approved, the company will raise $50 million from an unnamed investor to assist with this enterprise. This money will be used for the "acquisition and monetization of graphics proc...

item.title: Allbirds announced a switch from shoes to AI and its stock jumped 600 percent
item.description: Allbirds had a hit a decade ago with its Wool Runner shoes, but after a $4 billion IPO in 2021, the business never turned a profit, and sales dropped nearly 50 percent between 2022 and 2025. The company recently announced it would sell off its name and assets for $39 million to American Exchange after […]

item.title: Lowe's spring sale is like a Memorial Day preview — 40% off patio furniture, grills, appliances, and more
item.description: Lowe's has a massive spring sale, which is basically like a Memorial Day preview, thanks to huge savings on appliances, patio furniture, grills, lawn mowers, and more.

item.title: The end of encrypted DMs? Why Instagram is rolling back its biggest security feature
item.description: Your Instagram DMs are about to become a lot less private

item.title: Drone-killing laser weapons greenlit for use in US airspace – FAA and Defense Department say high-energy weapons are ‘ready to protect all air travelers from illicit drone use’ despite airspace restrictions and friendly-fire incidents
item.description: FFA approval of drone-killing high-energy laser weapons presents minimal risk to aircraft.

item.title: Traeger debuts Westwood smart pellet grills that start at $700
item.description: Traeger gave backyard pit masters something more affordable last year with the Woodridge, but now the company is back with an even more budget-friendly option. With the Westwood series, the company offers very basic pellet grill functionality with a simplified controller and a no-frills design. You’ll still get Wi-Fi connectivity that works with the company’s app, and the Westwood grills are compatible with Traeger’s rail-based accessories. As you might expect at the $700 and $800 prices, there are a number of caveats compared to the company’s more expensive options. The new Westwood grills ha...

item.title: Microsoft's Recall tool is back and still has major security concerns — but the company denies any data risk
item.description: Windows 11 Recall was delayed in 2024 due to security flaws, and those same issues are being discovered now, despite Microsoft's promise to secure user data.

item.title: The US Government Will Ask Data Centers How Much Power They Use
item.description: In a letter obtained by WIRED, the Energy Information Administration tells two senators that it plans to develop a mandatory assessment of data centers' energy use.

item.title: The Wicked Stepmother of ‘The Testaments’ Is So Much Fun to Hate
item.description: In 'The Handmaid’s Tale,' we saw Gilead wife Serena Joy’s evolution from villain to ally—but Paula reminds us that’s not always the journey on 'The Testaments.'

item.title: Apple’s Smart Glasses Are Stepping Into a Privacy Minefield
item.description: For a company built around privacy, smart glasses are a giant risk.

item.title: Motorola sues social platforms and creators over posts, raising speech concerns in India
item.description: Motorola is suing dozens of content creators and social media platforms including Instagram, X, and YouTube over posts it alleges are defamatory.

item.title: The Vivo X300 Ultra is a powerful camera phone aimed at videographers
item.description: Chinese phonemaker Vivo has been pushing the limits of smartphone photography in the last few years. However, the availability of its phones — like last year’s X200 Ultra, with its beefy add-on telephoto — has been intermittent in the West. The company says the X300 Ultra its first global flagship launch, although there’s still no word on a US launch or pricing at the time of writing. Like the latest phones from Xiaomi and Oppo, Vivo is also obsessing over larger camera sensors, peripherals and a dizzying array of technical photography specs, with a particular focus on cinematic video recordin...

item.title: Airwallex is about to take on Stripe and the rest of the payments industry — in the physical world
item.description: Airwallex, valued at $8 billion, is launching a point-of-sale product that lets businesses accept in-person payments in multiple countries via a single platform.

item.title: The Boys season 5 episode 3 sees Homelander nearly kill another Supe — and some Prime Video viewers argue that he 'should've gone through with it'
item.description: The Amazon TV show's audience have been left divided over its latest Supe showdown.

item.title: Gemini is now a native macOS app, making it faster and better integrated than ever before
item.description: Google has launched a native Gemini app for macOS, bringing its AI chatbot to the desktop with screen sharing, quick access shortcuts, and built-in image and video generation.

item.title: Amazon has been accused of ‘bricking’ older Fire TV Stick devices to get users to upgrade — and it’s sparked a class action lawsuit
item.description: The new lawsuit claims Amazon has been restricting important software updates for older models to force users to upgrade.

item.title: Avoid paying full price — a certified refurbished Kindle is a much cheaper option after this Amazon price cut
item.description: Buy a certified refurbished Kindle for an incredibly low price right now at Amazon, and enjoy being able to take thousands of books wherever you go.

item.title: Allbirds Is Getting Out of the Shoe Business and Pivoting to AI Infrastructure
item.description: Say hello to Newbird AI, a radical experiment in buying GPUs and praying that profits follow.

item.title: Crise de la RAM : les joueurs PC refusent de faire des concessions sur les SSD
item.description: Face à la crise de la RAM, les joueurs veulent bien revoir leurs ambitions à la baisse, du moment qu'on ne touche pas aux SSD de grande capacité.

item.title: There’s No Saving Windows 11. It’s Time for Windows 12
item.description: Windows 11 can't overcome a slew of bugs, security holes, and AI slop. It's time for something new.

item.title: 'We are currently being extorted' — crypto giant Kraken says it is facing extortion attack, here's what we know
item.description: The identity of the attackers isn't known, but this seems to have been an inside job.

item.title: VPN deal of the week: Our exclusive Surfshark deal gives you year-low prices and 4 months extra protection — here's how to claim
item.description: The best cheap VPN is even cheaper. Exclusively for TechRadar readers

item.title: Axiom Space Is Ready to Test Its Next-Generation Spacesuit in 2027
item.description: The company announced that it was nearly finished developing the spacesuit to be worn by astronauts during the Artemis missions.

item.title: Snap layoffs today: 16% of jobs cut as CEO Evan Spiegel is the latest to tout AI advances
item.description: The company said Wednesday it would let go of about 1,000 employees. SNAP stock rose over 6% on the news. On Wednesday, April 15, Snap CEO Evan Spiegel announced in a letter to employees that the company would lay off about 1,000 people, including 16% of its full-time employees.

item.title: I tried 7 free MTD software – now I've ranked my top picks as a freelancer
item.description: A look at the best free Making Tax Digital (MTD) software ahead of the new tax rules' first submission in August 2026.

item.title: This Jackery portable power station gets a massive $700 discount — and it's not the only one in the Earth Day Sale if you want off-grid, RV, and home back-up power from some of my favorite systems
item.description: Don't miss these top deals from some of our favorite portable power stations.

item.title: The Shure MoveMic Two Kit is down to a record-low price at Amazon — save over $150
item.description: The Shure MoveMic Two Kit is on sale at Amazon for $384, down from the normal price of $549. That's a 30% discount.

item.title: Le très complet Asus Vivobook S14 (AMD Ryzen AI 5, OLED) se démarque sur le marché du milieu de gamme avec cette remise de 200 euros
item.description: L'Asus Vivobook S14 présente une fiche technique complète avec sa dalle OLED de 14 pouces et une autonomie de plus de 15 heures. Chez Cdiscount, il passe de 799,99 euros à 599,99 euros. Seul petit bémol, l'absence de Windows dans le laptop.

item.title: Comment scanner un QR Code sur Android ou avec un iPhone ?
item.description: Que vous ayez un smartphone Android ou un iPhone, on vous explique comment scanner un QR Code et à quoi servent ces drôles de codes-barres en carré. Suivez le guide.

item.title: EU releases age-verification app
item.description: EU Commission President, Ursula von der Leyen, announced an EU age-verification app. Several countries already said they'll use it.

item.title: Amazon's 3 for $33 4K Blu-ray sale is back — here are my top 9 picks to add to your collection
item.description: Amazon's 3 for $33 4K Blu-ray sale is a great way to save big money on some excellent 4K discs, so I've picked my 9 favorites from the sale.

item.title: YouTube Music déploie une nouvelle interface sur Android et iOS
item.description: En chantier depuis plusieurs mois, le nouveau design de l'application YouTube Music débarque enfin sur nos smartphones. Voici ce qui change.
